历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 10135 → 11542 → 13123 → 11677 → 7935, showing a trend of first decreasing then increasing over the past 5 years. In 2025, the ranking significantly advanced to 7935, moving forward by about 3742 positions compared to 11677 in 2024, reaching the highest level in 5 years, indicating some pressure for a size-year correction. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Liaoning was 43 in 2021, 44 in 2022, 42 in 2023, 39 in 2024, and 38 in 2025, showing a gradual slight reduction trend. In 2026, the Physics Category plan is 34, and the Medical Category (for Physics Category) is 4, totaling 38, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction, having a neutral impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Soochow University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university, ranking 46th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with stable rankings in the 40–46 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level of 211 universities. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, involving a campus safety incident (a male college student maliciously using female classmates' photos), which may slightly suppress application enthusiasm. Douyin popularity is relatively hot (46th overall), with campus scenery content having some dissemination power. From 2021 to 2025, there were no records of admission gaps, and the admission trend was relatively stable. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Physical Education A- and Pharmacy A- are A- and above disciplines, with multiple other disciplines at B+ level. Traditional advantageous disciplines such as Clinical Medicine and Materials Science and Engineering, although not entering the A category, have high recognition within the industry.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Soochow University is located in Suzhou City, Jiangsu Province, in the economically developed Yangtze River Delta region, which has some regional appeal to Liaoning candidates. The university's enrollment proportion in Liaoning is about 0.02%, which is normal for cross-provincial enrollment. Popular majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information, and Clinical Medicine continue to have high social attention. In 2026, the total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in Liaoning is about 200,000, basically unchanged from 2025 (Physics Category 143,000 + History Category 56,000 ≈ 200,000), with a stable candidate scale.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the correction pressure after the significant ranking advance in 2025, unchanged enrollment plan, stable candidate scale, and somewhat negative reputation, it is expected that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will slightly decline compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 8135, with a range of 7635–8635.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission rankings for Soochow University's medical category in Liaoning Province over the past four years are: 2022: 15912 (planned 6 students), 2023: 15373 (planned 5 students), 2024: 7171 (planned 6 students), 2025: 8681 (planned 6 students). From 2022 to 2023, the ranking moved slightly forward by about 539 places; in 2024, the ranking jumped significantly to 7171 (moving forward by 8202 places compared to 2023); in 2025, it fell back to 8681 (moving backward by 1510 places compared to 2024). The 2026 medical enrollment plan is 4 students, a reduction of 2 students from 2025 (a 33.3% decrease). Additionally, in 2026, only two majors are retained: Clinical Medicine and Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated Program), while lower-scoring majors such as Radiation Medicine, Nursing, and Pharmacy are canceled, leading to a significant increase in the minimum admission threshold.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Soochow University is a key university under the 211 Project and has been selected as a national Double First-Class construction university. It is located in Suzhou, Jiangsu Province. The university has strong overall strength, with a long history in medical disciplines. Clinical Medicine is its traditional advantageous major, and it enjoys high recognition and appeal in the Northeast region.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: Medical majors have maintained high application popularity in recent years, with Clinical Medicine being particularly favored by candidates. Soochow University is located in the economically developed Yangtze River Delta region, with strong urban appeal, attracting many Liaoning candidates. In 2026, only 4 enrollment slots are allocated for medical majors in Liaoning, all in Clinical Medicine directions (including the 5+3 Integrated Program), with no lower-scoring majors like Nursing to serve as a buffer, making competition more concentrated.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the supply-demand elasticity model calculation and historical trend analysis, the predicted minimum admission ranking for Soochow University's medical category in Liaoning Province in 2026 is approximately 6895, with a corresponding ranking range of 6688 to 7102. Due to the reduction in enrollment plan and the cancellation of lower-scoring majors, the minimum ranking will move further forward compared to 2025, requiring candidates to have stronger competitiveness.
